title: ROKR 3D Wooden Puzzle Space Shuttle Model Kits For Adults To Build STEM Toy Gift LKA02
features: ROKR Designed Movable Space Shuttle Model Kits-Crafted with premium wooden materials, the ROKR Space Shuttle offers a tactile and visually appealing experience, bringing the essence of aerospace engineering to your fingertips.

Dynamic Space Launch Base with Liftoff and Recovery Simulation-Experience the thrill of space exploration with a dynamic base that simulates the entire launch and recovery process. The touch-sensitive button activates the horizontal recovery and vertical launch modes, making every interaction feel like a real mission.

Dual-Color Rocket Flame and Countdown Lighting Effects-The control tower’s yellow flashing lights simulate a countdown, followed by the ignition of dual-color rocket flames—orange and blue—that signify a successful launch, adding a dramatic and immersive touch to the experience.

DIY Fun For Space Lover's Gift,A Tribute to Space Exploration-For the space enthusiast in your life, the ROKR LKA02 Space Shuttle is more than a model—it’s a journey to the stars. This meticulously crafted wooden replica captures the excitement of space launches with dynamic features above.
Part Replacement If Needed - USB C cable and plug to be self-prepared.
